creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Sun Apr  6 05:48:08 2014
New Revision: 350312
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/350312
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r350312/

Log:
  - Update to 2.5.3
  - Use USES=tar:bzip2
  
  Changes:	http://git.savannah.gnu.org/cgit/freetype/freetype2-demos.git/tree/ChangeLog
  PR:		188116
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/print/ft2demos/Makefile
  head/print/ft2demos/distinfo

Modified: head/print/ft2demos/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/print/ft2demos/Makefile	Sun Apr  6 05:48:04 2014	(r350311)
+++ head/print/ft2demos/Makefile	Sun Apr  6 05:48:08 2014	(r350312)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	ft2demos
-PORTVERSION=	2.5.2
+PORTVERSION=	2.5.3
 CATEGORIES=	print
 MASTER_SITES=	SF/freetype/freetype-demos/${PORTVERSION} \
 		RINGSERVER/graphics/freetype/freetype2
@@ -16,9 +16,8 @@ LICENSE_COMB=	dual
 BUILD_DEPENDS+=	${FREETYPE_WRKSRC}/config.mk:${PORTSDIR}/print/freetype2:build
 LIB_DEPENDS=	libfreetype.so:${PORTSDIR}/print/freetype2
 
-USE_BZIP2=	yes
 USE_XORG=	xext
-USES=		gmake
+USES=		gmake tar:bzip2
 USE_AUTOTOOLS=	libtool:env
 MAKE_ENV=	TOP_DIR="${FREETYPE_WRKSRC}"
 MAKE_ARGS=	EXES="${FT_PROGRAMS}" X11_PATH="${LOCALBASE}"

Modified: head/print/ft2demos/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/print/ft2demos/distinfo	Sun Apr  6 05:48:04 2014	(r350311)
+++ head/print/ft2demos/distinfo	Sun Apr  6 05:48:08 2014	(r350312)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (ft2demos-2.5.2.tar.bz2) = a3cdf60186caeb68cafc98b6b32c54ae9467a7a844865db161510a17a2d14471
-SIZE (ft2demos-2.5.2.tar.bz2) = 185966
+SHA256 (ft2demos-2.5.3.tar.bz2) = e6c9d0b344b88ff5ab25f20640cf78e2ec56bb81a89d1cd1716839357f646c8a
+SIZE (ft2demos-2.5.3.tar.bz2) = 186773
